allow: Bash(cd "c:/Users/me/Documents/GitHub/Helgatchi" && echo "---WebFlasher---" && find WebFlasher -type f | head -50 && echo "---partitions---" && cat Software/Helgatchi-Firmware/partitions.csv && echo "---gitignore---" && cat .gitignore)

Bash(NB="c:/Users/me/Documents/GitHub/Helgatchi/Software/Helgatchi-Firmware/.pio/libdeps/seeed_xiao_esp32s3/NimBLE-Arduino"; echo "=== ESP_PWR_LVL_P9 numeric value ==="; grep -rn "ESP_PWR_LVL_P9" "c:/Users/me/.platformio/packages/framework-arduinoespressif32/tools/sdk/esp32s3/include/bt/host/bluedroid/api/include/api/esp_gap_ble_api.h" 2>/dev/null | head; grep -rn "ESP_PWR_LVL_P9\\b" "c:/Users/me/.platformio/packages/framework-arduinoespressif32/tools/sdk/esp32s3/include/bt/"  2>/dev/null | head; echo "=== NimBLEDevice::setPower full context \(both overloads\) ==="; sed -n '160,170p' "$NB/src/NimBLEDevice.h")

Bash(find "$HOME/.platformio/packages" -iname "esp_bt.h" 2>/dev/null | head; echo "===search bt.h in framework==="; find "$HOME/.platformio" -path "*bt*" -iname "*.h" 2>/dev/null | grep -i "esp_bt.h" | head)
Bash(ls "$HOME/.platformio/packages/toolchain-xtensa-esp-elf/bin/" 2>/dev/null | grep addr2line; ls "$HOME/.platformio/packages/toolchain-xtensa-esp32s3-elf/bin/" 2>/dev/null | grep addr2line)

Bash(find ~/.platformio/packages -name "WiFiScan.h" 2>/dev/null | head -3; echo "---"; find "$HOME/.platformio/packages" -path "*esp32*/version.txt" 2>/dev/null | head; echo "--- platform ---"; cat ~/.platformio/platforms/espressif32/platform.json 2>/dev/null | grep -i '"version"' | head)

Bash(echo "=== esp-coredump / espcoredump tool ==="; find ~/.platformio/packages -iname "*coredump*" -name "*.py" 2>/dev/null | head; find ~/.platformio/packages -type d -iname "*coredump*" 2>/dev/null | head; echo "=== esptool ==="; find ~/.platformio/packages -name "esptool.py" 2>/dev/null | head -1)

Bash(sed -n '280,295p' .pio/libdeps/seeed_xiao_esp32s3/lvgl/src/widgets/msgbox/lv_msgbox.c 2>/dev/null; echo "---- esp_wifi promiscuous ----"; grep -rn "esp_wifi_set_promiscuous_rx_cb\\|WIFI_PROMIS_FILTER_MASK_MGMT\\|wifi_promiscuous_pkt_t\\b\\|esp_wifi_set_channel\(" ~/.platformio/packages/framework-arduinoespressif32/tools/esp32-arduino-libs/*/esp32s3/include/esp_wifi/include/esp_wifi*.h 2>/dev/null | head; echo "exit: search done")
